narratives.evidence_quote: रूस ने साफ-साफ कह दिया है कि अगर नाटो यूक्रेन के समर्थन में उसके शहरों पर हमला करता है तो परमाणु युद्ध टाला नहीं जा सकता.
narratives.reasoning: The quote explicitly evokes the possibility of nuclear war as a consequence of NATO actions, thus intentionally amplifying fear about escalation and catastrophic outcomes.

narratives.evidence_quote: अगर यूक्रेन इसी तरह से हमला करता रहा तो अगले साल मार्च-अप्रैल तक ये बेहद कमजोर हो जाएगा.
narratives.reasoning: The sentence projects a future military outcome (Ukraine becoming very weak by a certain time), reflecting speculative forecasting about the war’s trajectory.

narratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन के पास लंबी दूरी का हमला करने की तकनीक और विज्ञान नहीं है.
narratives.reasoning: This asserts a deficiency in Ukraine’s military capabilities, which serves to undermine Ukraine’s legitimacy and effectiveness.

narratives.narrative_name: URW: Blaming the war on others rather than the invader
narratives.evidence_quote: अगर नाटो ने सीधा हमला किया तो जंग रूस और नाटो की होगी.
narratives.reasoning: The quote shifts potential responsibility for escalation onto NATO, attributing blame to Western actions rather than focusing on Russia's role.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Amplifying war-related fears: There is a real possibility that nuclear weapons will be employed
subnarratives.evidence_quote: रूस ने साफ-साफ कह दिया है कि अगर नाटो यूक्रेन के समर्थन में उसके शहरों पर हमला करता है तो परमाणु युद्ध टाला नहीं जा सकता.
subnarratives.reasoning: This direct statement links NATO aggression to the inevitability of nuclear war, directly supporting the subnarrative that nuclear weapons could be employed.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Amplifying war-related fears: Russia will also attack other countries
subnarratives.evidence_quote: चौथा रास्ता है कि रूस नाटो के बाल्टिक और रोमानिया में मौजूद हथियार डिपो और लॉजिस्टिक्स पर हमला करके उसे बर्बाद कर दे.
subnarratives.reasoning: This sentence explicitly envisions Russia attacking other countries (Baltic states and Romania), illustrating a propagation of fear about expanding conflict beyond Ukraine.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Speculating war outcomes: Russian army is collapsing
subnarratives.evidence_quote: अगर यूक्रेन इसी तरह से हमला करता रहा तो अगले साल मार्च-अप्रैल तक ये बेहद कमजोर हो जाएगा.
subnarratives.reasoning: The quote directly predicts a significant decline in Russian military strength, signaling collapse or severe weakening.

subnarratives.evidence_quote: अगर नाटो ने सीधा हमला किया तो जंग रूस और नाटो की होगी.
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement envisions a direct, large-scale war between Russia and NATO, representing a broad war-outcome scenario not captured by the more specific subnarratives.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Discrediting Ukraine: Discrediting Ukrainian military
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन के पास लंबी दूरी का हमला करने की तकनीक और विज्ञान नहीं है.
subnarratives.reasoning: The sentence asserts that Ukraine lacks long-range attack technology and science, directly undermining the capability and effectiveness of the Ukrainian military.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Blaming the war on others rather than the invader: The West are the aggressors
subnarratives.evidence_quote: अगर नाटो यूक्रेन के समर्थन में उसके शहरों पर हमला करता है तो परमाणु युद्ध टाला नहीं जा सकता.
subnarratives.reasoning: This quote portrays NATO (the West) as a potential aggressor by threatening to attack Russia's cities in support of Ukraine, thus shifting responsibility for the aggression away from Russia.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Blaming the war on others rather than the invader: Other
subnarratives.evidence_quote: यह परीक्षण किसी भी समय हो सकता है. यह पश्चिमी देशों को अपनी ताकत दिखाने का एक तरीका है, ताकि जंग को रोका जा सके.
subnarratives.reasoning: This statement discusses Western powers' actions as a display of force to deter war, representing a charge against external actors without fitting the two more specific subnarratives.
